title: Magex's Shelf-Shrooms
description: This resource pack adds shelf mushrooms to the game!
body:
If you **enjoy** this resource pack, consider supporting me on [buymeacoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magex_ya)!

![Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c701beb3ae4fadf62891a30faefc9faa3a09bc8.png)

# About
Magex’s Shelf-Shrooms enhances your world’s ambience by surrounding ordinary mushrooms with shelf fungi that cling to the blocks around them. Whether you’re decorating a woodland hut, a mystical cavern, or a giant mushroom biome, these subtle additions bring extra texture and realism without breaking Minecraft’s original art style.
![png_desc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fabeeca2b67d6fcf763be532b10314a0485568cc.png)

# Features
- Changes the model of the warped fungus
- Changes the model of the crimson fungus
- Changes the model of the brown mushroom
- Changes the model of the red mushroom


This resource pack is inspired by [Caelesti's](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/caelesti) mushroom feature!
